info.label: What
info.value: A deploy runbook written once, then operated by a human (TUI), a script, or an AI agent (menuki exec / MCP run_action).

info.label: Contract
info.value: Each item's description + help is the instruction the agent reads from `list` - keep them accurate and it can run the runbook unattended.

info.label: Try
info.value: menuki list --config <this>   then   menuki exec --config <this> --action main/preflight

items.name: Preflight
items.description: Run all pre-deploy checks in order; stops at the first failure.
items.help: A sequence action: one exec runs every step. stop_on_error means the agent sees a non-zero exit and the failing step's output the moment a check fails.

items.name: Build
items.description: Build an image with an explicit tag. The tag format is validated.
items.help: Pass --param tag=v1.2.3. Only semver-like tags are accepted, so the agent cannot build an unlabeled image.

items.name: Deploy
items.description: Deploy a built tag to an environment; returns a JSON result.
items.help: Two typed inputs give the agent the full contract: environment is a fixed choice, tag is validated. Result is JSON so the agent can confirm success.

items.name: Status
items.description: Report the currently deployed version per environment as JSON.
items.help: A read-only shell action with format:json. Safe for an agent to poll before and after a deploy.

items.name: Rollback
items.description: Roll an environment back to a previous tag. Requires explicit confirmation.
items.help: The confirm input is a boolean the agent must set to proceed (--param confirm=true), guarding a destructive step behind an explicit flag.
